item.title: Notes on Learning Calculus of Variations
item.author: æ»‘ç¿”é—ª
item.description: A study note on the calculus of variations based on Alpha C. Chiang’s textbook on dynamic optimization, covering the catenary problem, the brachistochrone problem, and monopoly pricing.
